name: FctsIdsInterPlnBillTransExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
'WITH cte AS ( ',
'SELECT CAST(BILL.GL_INTER_PLAN_BILL_DTL_CK AS INT) AS GL_INTER_PLAN_BILL_DTL_CK, ',
'BILL.LOBD_ID, ',
'BILL.PDBL_ACCT_CAT, ',
'BILL.CRME_PAY_FROM_DT, ',
'BILL.CRME_PAY_THRU_DT, ',
'BILL.CRME_PYMT_METH_IND, ',
'BILL.GRGR_ID, ',
'BILL.ACCOUNTING_DT, ',
'BILL.MONETARY_AMOUNT, ',
'BILL.BILL_DTL_SRL_NO ',
'FROM ',
'@{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_BCBSFINOwner}',
'.GL_INTER_PLAN_BILL_DTL BILL ',
'WHERE BILL.MAP_EFF_DT = ''',
@pipeline().parameters.StrtDt,
''' AND BILL.SNAP_ACT_DT = ''',
@pipeline().parameters.EndDt,
''') SELECT * FROM cte' 
)

Description:
JOB NAME:  FctsIdsInterPlnBillTransExtr
Called By:FctsBcbsExtInterPlnBillLoadSeq

Process Description: Extract Data from (GL_INTER_PLN_BILL_DTL) and Load it to IDS
